value.found_quote: Claude Code offers two sandbox modes:\n\n**Auto-allow mode**: Bash commands will attempt to run inside the sandbox and are automatically allowed without requiring permission. ... **Regular permissions mode**: All Bash commands go through the regular permission flow, even when sandboxed.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes two sandbox modes — auto-allow and regular permissions — matching the claim. It is presented as a built-in, currently available feature of Claude Code.
